images.copyright: Pink apple blossoms, Avila Beach, California (© Mimi Ditchie Photography/Getty Images)
images.title: Bloom boom
images.caption: Pink apple blossoms, Avila Beach, California
images.desc: Spring brings apple trees to life with clouds of soft pink blossoms. Their delicate petals brighten orchards and hillsides, standing out against clear blue skies as the season shifts from winter toward warmer days. These blooms attract pollinators such as bees and butterflies, helping fruit trees produce the apples that will grow later in the year.
